dimensions.name: Delivery
dimensions.detail: Message delivered successfully. 4/4 agents responded (Míriel, Orion, Elanor, Narvi).

dimensions.name: Relevance
dimensions.detail: All provided task/blockers info. But 3/4 agents (Míriel, Elanor, Narvi) identified by role title instead of their actual names — missing basic identity awareness. Only Orion used his real name. -8 points.

dimensions.name: Latency
dimensions.detail: Avg response time: ~4.5s. Míriel: 4.4s, Orion: 4.5s, Elanor: 4.5s, Narvi: 4.7s. Fast, but all responses landed within 0.3s window suggesting parallel processing. -4 for clustering.

improvements: Previous issue (Orion stale awareness) appears resolved — he responded concisely without inaccurate claims about other agents. Sent correction to Míriel, Elanor, and Narvi about using their actual names instead of role titles.
issues: 3/4 agents (Míriel, Elanor, Narvi) don't identify by their assigned names — they use role titles (UI Designer, Frontend Developer, Backend Architect) and some explicitly say they 'haven't picked a name yet' despite having assigned names. This suggests their system prompts may not include their character names, or the names aren't reinforced. Also all agents report 'no active tasks / standing by' — either no work is assigned or they lack awareness of their backlog.
